title: Crim's Party GUI
description: Adds a GUI that shows you the health, saturation and level of players in your team/party.
body:
**Adds a GUI that displays the health, saturation and xp level of your team/party members. it's also compatible with Open Parties mod.**


![GUI1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49341a7a4d95860fea886fdd555835fe18822a7.png)
![GUI2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c39526e3c7acf1840f74f972b6e0c4fccbb9a8f9.png)

**Also supports any resource pack that changes the default icons of the health, saturation and level bar.**

![GUI3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb0d69e6ec20ea909636b10b58d0de2791563ee7.png)

**The mod should be compatible with most other mods and is configurable, you can move the GUI and anchor it wherever you like.**

**- Known Issues**

Sometimes your own healthbar will display after death in multiplayer with a certain mod. (Currently being investigated.) Restarting the game will remove that bar until you die again.

**For questions about updates, contact me directly on discord: ItzCrim**
